description_long: This is a rectangular window-mounted air conditioner unit, primarily finished in white and light gray. The front face features a large intake grille with horizontal slats, a digital control panel, and adjustable air direction louvers. The top and side panels are vented with parallel slats for airflow, revealing some of the internal components through the grilles. The rear side displays a metal heat exchanger coil, protected by a sturdy grille. The unit is constructed from metal and plastic, with visible screws and seams indicating assembly points. The overall design is utilitarian, optimized for efficient cooling and easy installation in a window frame.
description: A rectangular, white window air conditioner with a front control panel, vented sides, and a rear heat exchanger grille. The design is functional, with visible slats and a digital display.
description_view_0: Side view showing vertical vent slats and the depth of the unit.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the intake grille, digital control panel, and adjustable louvers.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar vertical vent slats as the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view highlighting the exposed heat exchanger coil and protective grille.
attribute_brand_logo: A rectangular brand logo is visible on the upper left of the front panel, with dark text on a white background.
attribute_grille_pattern: The front grille has horizontal slats with narrow spacing, while the side grilles feature vertical slats. The rear grille is a grid pattern protecting the heat exchanger.
attribute_control_panel_location: Top center of the front face, just above the main intake grille.
attribute_exhaust_vent_design: The exhaust vent is located at the rear, consisting of a large rectangular metal grille with horizontal and vertical bars protecting the heat exchanger.
